key_decisions.decision: When ExceptionTypeUriProvider returns null, fall back to 'about:blank' and set Title to reason phrase per RFC 7807; when it returns a URI, set Title to exception type name
key_decisions.reasoning: RFC 7807 section 3.1 explicitly states that 'about:blank' MUST use the reason phrase as Title; custom URIs allow descriptive titles

solve_notes: Fixed `CreateProblemDetails` to set `Type = "about:blank"` and `Title` to the HTTP status reason phrase, satisfying RFC 7807 requirements. Added an `ExceptionTypeUriProvider` delegate property to `DeveloperExceptionPageOptions` that, when set, allows callers to supply a custom documentation URI for known exception types; in that case the exception type name is used as the title instead.
task_text: The `DeveloperExceptionPageMiddlewareImpl.CreateProblemDetails()` in `src/Middleware/Diagnostics/src/DeveloperExceptionPage/DeveloperExceptionPageMiddlewareImpl.cs` sets `ProblemDetails.Title` to the exception type name (e.g., `"NullReferenceException"`) but never sets `ProblemDetails.Type`, which defaults to `null` (treated as `about:blank` by RFC 7807). RFC 7807 requires that when `type` is `about:blank`, `title` MUST equal the HTTP status reason phrase (e.g., `"Internal Server Error"` for 500). Fix `CreateProblemDetails()` to set `Type` to `about:blank` and change `Title` to the HTTP status reason phrase, then add an `ExceptionTypeUriProvider` delegate property to `DeveloperExceptionPageOptions` that allows callers to supply a documentation URI for known exception types, overriding `about:blank`. Touches `src/Middleware/Diagnostics/src/DeveloperExceptionPage/` (2–3 files).
